CustomField.description: FTE posts - % of business, public service, engineering & technology associate professionals (SOC Codes 31-35)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Estimated percentage of business, public service, engineering and technology associate professionals directly involved in delivering Wave 3 project so far. For example: data analysts, sales and marketing executives, project support officers, account managers (SOC Codes 31-35)
CustomField.label: FTE Post - % Assoc Prof (Bus/Eng/etc)
